subject: Super Saiyan Gotenks in mid-shot action pose, child fusion warrior
description: A young Super Saiyan fighter is shown in a mid-shot, body slightly angled, in a dynamic combat pose. His hair stands upright in the Super Saiyan form and appears multi-directional and voluminous. He wears a Metamoran fusion vest, the characteristic black-and-white sleeveless vest associated with the Fusion Dance technique. His expression reads as confident or cocky. The background is a blue sky gradient with motion streak lines. Energy or ki radiates from the figure.
foreground: Young Super Saiyan fighter in Metamoran fusion vest with upright spiky hair in combat pose
background: Blue sky gradient with motion streaks
